item.title: Move CONTRIBUTING.md to docs/CONTRIBUTING.md and update references
item.intent: All documentation must live in docs/ for consistency — a contributor looking in docs/ must find contribution guidelines there, not hunt at the repo root.
item.description: CONTRIBUTING.md exists at repo root with complete content: Development Setup, Requirements, Code Style (bash conventions + naming table), Linting and Testing (shellcheck, syntax check, smoke test, JSON validation, checksums), Pull Request Process, Commit Convention table, Architecture section, and CLA. The move is straightforward: relocate the file, replace the inline Architecture section with a link to docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (FEAT-014), and add a section on agent prompt authoring (how to modify files in .aishore/agents/ and test prompt changes). Update any references to CONTRIBUTING.md in README.md and other files to point to the new location. GitHub will still find CONTRIBUTING.md via the docs/ path for its contributing prompt.
steps: In docs/CONTRIBUTING.md, replace the inline Architecture section with a link: 'See [ARCHITECTURE.md](ARCHITECTURE.md) for system architecture and design decisions'
Add a new section 'Agent Prompt Authoring' explaining how to modify .aishore/agents/*.md files, what each agent file controls, and how to test prompt changes
Search all files for references to CONTRIBUTING.md and update paths to docs/CONTRIBUTING.md
Verify README.md Contributing section links to docs/CONTRIBUTING.md
acceptanceCriteria: docs/CONTRIBUTING.md exists with all original content preserved
CONTRIBUTING.md no longer exists at repo root
The inline Architecture section is replaced with a link to docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
An Agent Prompt Authoring section exists explaining how to modify agent files
All references to CONTRIBUTING.md across the repo point to docs/CONTRIBUTING.md
